claims.text: Nuclear energy is the lowest-carbon baseload power source available at scale
claims.confidence_rationale: IPCC and multiple lifecycle analyses confirm very low lifecycle emissions

evidence.text: IPCC lifecycle emissions for nuclear: 12g CO2eq/kWh vs 820g for coal

perspectives.name: The Climate Pragmatist
perspectives.short_description: Accepts nuclear as necessary climate tool
perspectives.long_description: Argues that opposition to nuclear energy on safety grounds must be weighed against the certain harms of continued fossil fuel use.
